description: Domain Authority governance module — operational physics for domain-level administrators who manage the education domain. Covers role assignment, physics staging, module management, escalation oversight, and domain-wide progress monitoring. No curriculum-specific invariants apply; invariants enforce governance integrity.

invariants.description: Every role assignment or revocation must produce an auditable log entry with the assigning authority, target entity, old role, new role, and timestamp.
All domain-physics modifications must pass through the staging workflow (gated_staging) before commit. Direct edits to active physics are forbidden.
Module assignments for entities must be reviewed and approved by an authorized role (teacher or above) before activation.
All escalation packets routed to the domain authority must be acknowledged within the configured SLA window. Breaches are logged and forwarded to root.

standing_orders.description: Block the edit and notify the requester that physics changes must go through the staging workflow.
Place the module assignment request in the review queue and notify the responsible teacher or DA.
Log the SLA breach, notify the domain authority, and if unresolved escalate to root.
Present the oldest pending escalation packet for DA review. If not resolved after 3 prompts, forward to root.
Present a staged physics diff for DA approval or rejection. Show invariant impact summary.
Present a pending module assignment request for DA approval. Show requesting teacher, target student, and justification.

escalation_triggers.condition: An escalation packet addressed to the domain authority has exceeded its SLA window without acknowledgment.
A physics commit was attempted that would violate structural integrity (e.g. removing a critical invariant referenced by active modules).

roles.description: Domain-level administrator with full oversight of the education domain. Manages teacher roster, module assignments, standing-order modifications, and logic-scrape triggers.

governance.description: Domain authority governance group with full administrative access.

default_task_spec.description: Domain authority governance landing — escalation review, physics staging, role management.
